name: 5 Star Car Title Loans
description_short: Youngstown's 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1802 Belmont Ave offers emergency car title loans.
description_long:
5 Star Car Title Loans operates at 1802 Belmont Ave in Youngstown, OH, providing convenient access to car title loans in the heart of the city. The storefront is open Monday through Friday from 9AM to 7PM, Saturday 10AM to 5PM, and closed Sundays, making it accessible for working professionals throughout Youngstown.

This Youngstown location specializes in fast car title loans for residents who need quick cash. Whether you're facing an unexpected expense or need emergency funds, the team at this 1802 Belmont Ave location can evaluate your vehicle and provide funding. Contact them at +1 330-708-7131 to discuss your options.

For Youngstown residents considering a car title loan, bring your vehicle title, government-issued ID, and proof of residency to this location. 5 Star Car Title Loans offers straightforward terms so you can make an informed decision about your financial needs.
pros: Same-day or next-day funding available for qualified applicants
Loan amounts up to $50,000, larger than typical payday loans
Borrowers keep their vehicle while using title as collateral
No prepayment penalties, allowing early payoff without additional fees
Operates in approximately 18 states with multiple physical locations
Claims to work with applicants who have poor or no credit history
Online application option plus in-person locations for accessibility
cons: Vehicle title used as collateral—default results in repossession and loss of transportation
No APR or fee information disclosed on website, making true cost opaque
Terms and availability vary significantly by state; specific rates not published
High-risk lending product with potential for debt spirals and vehicle loss
Customer testimonials are company-curated; no independent review sources provided
best_for: Vehicle owners facing immediate cash emergencies who have equity in their car and can afford repayment
Borrowers with damaged credit who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans or credit cards
Those needing $2,000-$50,000 who can reliably make monthly payments and accept collateral risk
diagnosis: 5 Star Car Title Loans is best for vehicle owners with immediate cash needs and reliable income who understand and accept the risk of collateral-based borrowing. The critical caveat is that while this product enables fast access to larger cash amounts than payday loans, defaulting on the loan results in loss of your vehicle—a severe consequence that makes this suitable only for borrowers confident in their repayment ability and who have exhausted safer alternatives.
services: Installment loans with up to 24-month repayment terms
meta_description: 5 Star Car Title Loans at 1802 Belmont Ave, Youngstown, OH. Same-day funding for car title loans.
